arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag continues to maintain relationship sith Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Erik ten Hag was spotted at Borussia Dortmund’s 3-2 loss to Bayer Leverkusen on Friday evening. The former Manchester United manager has been a regular visitor to…

arts.ttl: Report: Borussia Dortmund Pursuing Arsenal’s Oleksandr Zinchenko
arts.sum: BVB are interested in a loan for Zinchenko, but Arsenal are pushing to include an obligation to buy in any deal for the player, with the fee reported to be ~€20m. Another day, another report linking Borussia Dortmund to an unfavored Premier League player.

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Visit Holstein Kiel
arts.sum: The two sides have played each other twice in the DFB Pokal, in two of Dortmund’s last three DFB Pokal winning campaigns, but today’s match marks the first league game. They lead the league in total goals conceded at 41 and have only notched two wins in sixteen games this season.

arts.ttl: Dortmund reportedly exploring deal for Arsenal player
arts.sum: According to a report, Borussia Dortmund are considering a move for Arsenal's Oleksandr Zinchenko.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star pushing for exit as Borussia Dortmund open talks
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have opened talks with Arsenal for Oleksandr Zinchenko, who is 'keen to leave,' according to German media. According to Sky Germany, Borussia Dortmund are in ongoing talks with Arsenal over Zinchenko after approaching the Gunners in recent days.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund interested in Arsenal’s Oleksandr Zinchenko to add depth to left-back
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Borussia Dortmund is interested in Arsenal’s left-back, Oleksandr Zinchenko, as they are looking to add depth to the position. Dortmund are already exploring a deal for the…

The Bundesliga resumed after the winter pause with injury-hit Dortmund losing 3-2 to Leverkusen under the Friday evening floodlights. Apart from their two wins, Kiel, German champions way back in 191...

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund and Aston Villa Reach Deal for Donyell Malen
arts.sum: Donyell Malen’s career with Borussia Dortmund has come to an end. The deal has been confirmed by Patrick Berger, and Borussia Dortmund has announced that Malen has been left out of the squad traveling to Kiel to come to personal terms with his new club.

arts.ttl: Report: BVB Interested in Loans for Man Utd’s Marcus Rashford and Chelsea’s Carney Chukwuemeka
arts.sum: Reports over the last week have linked Borussia Dortmund to loan deals for Manchester United's Marcus Rashford and Chelsea's Carney Chukwuemeka, and today's news suggests that at least one of those deals may be closer to becoming a reality. It doesn't look like the 21-year-old English midfielder will be available to buy, at least not at a price that Dortmund would be willing to pay, but if BVB are looking to bring in offensive reinforcements, Carney is a pretty good shout.

arts.ttl: Predicted Holstein Kiel v Borussia Dortmund Xis
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will be without Donyell Malen for their Bundesliga game against Holstein Kiel on Tuesday night. The Dutchman is closing in on a move away from the club with…
